description: A collection of servers which are deliberately vulnerable to learn Pentesting MCP Servers.
Rust MCP server for comprehensive code intelligence - 90 tools, 32 languages, security scanning, call graphs, and more
Remote MCP Server that securely connects Enterprise context with your LLM, IDE, or agent platform of choice.

An interactive disassembler for the CPU 6502, focused on Commodore 8-bit computers. Features a TUI with modern features like x-ref, undo/redo, flow arrows, keyboard-driven, MCP server for auto analysis, VICE debugger and more!
AI semantic search for Zotero, with a built-in MCP server for AI agents (Claude Code, Codex). Find papers by meaning. 100% local and private.
A Cli, a webUI, and a MCP server for the Z-Image-Turbo text-to-image generation model (Tongyi-MAI/Z-Image-Turbo base model as well as quantized models)
McDonald's China MCP Server Integration Guide
Reticle intercepts, visualizes, and profiles JSON-RPC traffic between your LLM and MCP servers in real-time, with zero latency overhead. Stop debugging blind. Start seeing everything.
Code intelligence for AI assistants - MCP server, CLI, and HTTP API with symbol navigation, impact analysis, and architecture mapping
